## Description {#description}

Contains a list of completion tokens.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `word` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Completion token.
- `context` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Token entity kind (e.g. table).
- `belongs` ([Nullable(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) — Token for entity, this token belongs to (e.g. name of owning database).
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
